title: A bad beer mod
description: A crappy beer mod i made in 10 minutes. You make beer and get drunk!!!
body:
# Welcome to the bad beer mod
**this mod was made in 10 minutes do not expect it to be good / i was bored and made it**

## Items included:
- Beerify block
- Beer
- Empty Glass
- Bottle of Vomit

## How to vomit
1. Get drunk
2. Get empty glass (big glass thing)
3. Right click and vomit into it
4. Drink it if you dare
